title: Bosnia and Herzegovina (Republika Srpska) — Annual Tax Return for Income Tax (Form 1004)
description: The Tax Administration of Republika Srpska's (Poreska uprava Republike Srpske, PURS), part of the Ministry of Finance, Form 1004, Годишња пореска пријава за порез на доходак (Annual Tax Return for Income Tax) — opens Bosnia and Herzegovina's Taxes vertical (3 of 6). Republika Srpska is one of Bosnia and Herzegovina's constituent entities (the other being the Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina, plus the Brčko District); this schema is scoped to Republika Srpska only, consistent with this registry's existing ba/apif and ba/mup-rs schemas. Individual taxpayers who realize income from more than one of six income categories in a tax year (personal earnings/employment, copyright income, capital income, capital gains, self-employment income, and other income) must file this annual reconciliation return, per Article 41 of Republika Srpska's Law on Income Tax. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Bosnia and Herzegovina, the Government of Republika Srpska, or the Tax Administration of Republika Srpska.

authority.name: Пореска управа Републике Српске (Tax Administration of Republika Srpska)

source.documentRef: Образац 1004 — "Годишња пореска пријава за порез на доходак" (Form 1004 — Annual Tax Return for Income Tax)

verification.notes: GOV-4727 ("GovSchema Standard Research"). Opens Bosnia and Herzegovina's Taxes vertical (3 of 6). See this document's own VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, extraction method, and every disclosed scoping/judgment call.

steps.title: Одјељак 1 – Подаци о пореском обвезнику (Taxpayer data)

fields.name: taxpayerId
fields.label: 1) ЈМБ/ЈИБ
fields.description: The taxpayer's unique personal identification number (JMB, for a natural person) or unique identification number (JIB, e.g. for a self-employed/registered entrepreneur), printed as a 13-box comb field.

fields.name: filingType
fields.label: 4) Врста пријаве
fields.description: Whether this is a basic (original) annual return or an amended return correcting a previously filed one.

fields.name: amendedFilingBarcode
fields.label: Бар-код основне пријаве
fields.description: The protocol/barcode number of the original (basic) filing being corrected. The form's own instruction (matching the Tax Administration's XML e-filing guide for the same form family) states this is filled in only when submitting an amended return, and left blank for a basic return.
fields.sourceRef: Section 1, header-right box, "Бар-код основне пријаве (попуњава се само код подношења измијењене пријаве)"

fields.name: municipalityCode
fields.label: 5) Шифра општине
fields.description: The 3-digit code of the municipality where the taxpayer is registered for this return, printed as a 3-box comb field.

fields.name: fullName
fields.label: 2) Име и презиме
fields.description: The taxpayer's full given name and surname.

fields.name: address
fields.label: 3) Адреса
fields.description: The taxpayer's address.

fields.name: phone
fields.label: 6) Телефон
fields.description: The taxpayer's contact telephone number.

fields.name: email
fields.label: 7) E-mail адреса
fields.description: The taxpayer's email address.

fields.name: taxPeriodFrom
fields.label: 8) Порески период — Од
fields.description: Start date of the tax period this annual return covers. The form prints two stacked DD/MM/20YY box rows under "Порески период" with no printed "Од"/"До" labels; a worked example published by the Tax Administration alongside this same form ("Primjer popunjavanja obrasca 1004") confirms the upper row is the period start and the lower row the period end, each in day/month/year order with the "20" century prefix pre-printed and only the last two year digits taxpayer-entered — see this document's own VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Section 1, item 8, "Порески период", first (upper) DD/MM/20YY box row

fields.name: taxPeriodTo
fields.label: 8) Порески период — До
fields.description: End date of the tax period this annual return covers (typically 31 December of the tax year, but the box structure accommodates a partial-year period). See taxPeriodFrom's own description and this document's VERIFICATION.md for the source's box-layout ambiguity and how it was resolved.
fields.sourceRef: Section 1, item 8, "Порески период", second (lower) DD/MM/20YY box row

fields.name: selfEmploymentIncomeCarriedLoss
fields.label: Р. бр. 5 (Доходак од самосталне дјелатности), колона 8 (Пренесени губитак за умањење пореске основице)
fields.description: Loss carried forward from a prior tax period, applied to reduce the tax base for self-employment income (Доходак од самосталне дјелатности). The form's own column 8 cell is shaded/blocked for every other income-type row (personal earnings, copyright income, capital income, capital gain, other income, and the total row) — a loss carryforward against the tax base only applies to self-employment income under Republika Srpska's income tax law, so this field is modelled only for this row, not the other six.

fields.name: refundPaymentAccountNumber
fields.label: Молим да ми се износ више плаћеног пореза уплати на рачун
fields.description: The taxpayer's own bank transaction account number, into which an overpaid-tax refund should be paid, if the taxpayer requests a cash refund rather than an advance credit. See this document's own VERIFICATION.md for how this line's two unlabelled PDF form widgets were collapsed to a single field.
fields.sourceRef: Section 2 footer, "Молим да ми се износ више плаћеног пореза уплати на рачун/текући рачун"

fields.name: overpaymentAsAdvanceCreditNote
fields.label: Износ више плаћеног пореза ħу користити као аконтацију за будуће пореске обавезе
fields.description: Taxpayer's own note electing to carry an overpaid-tax amount forward as an advance credit against future tax obligations, instead of (or alongside) a cash refund. See this document's own VERIFICATION.md for how this line's two unlabelled PDF form widgets were collapsed to a single field.
fields.sourceRef: Section 2 footer, "Износ више плаћеног пореза ħу користити као аконтацију за будуће пореске обавезе"

fields.name: authorizedPersonFullName
fields.label: Име и презиме овлаштеног лица / законског заступника
fields.description: Full name of the authorized person or legal representative certifying, under moral, material, and criminal liability, that every entry in this return is complete, accurate, and truthful.
fields.sourceRef: Овјера (Certification) — Овјера пореског обвезника (Taxpayer certification) block

fields.name: certificationDate
fields.label: Датум
fields.description: Date this return was certified by the authorized person/legal representative.

fields.name: preparerFullName
fields.label: Име и презиме лица које је попунило пријаву
fields.description: Full name of the person who physically completed this return, when different from the authorized person/legal representative certifying it (e.g. an accountant or other preparer).
fields.sourceRef: Овјера пореског обвезника block, "Име и презиме лица које је попунило пријаву"
